AGENT_HANDOFF_PHASE_1A.title: Agent Handoff — Phase 1A
AGENT_HANDOFF_PHASE_1A.content:
Phase 1A Handoff: Thorpe Vault Bootstrap
Overview
This phase established a new standalone Thorpe family research vault, imported initial source files from Butch, and created base navigation/reference/person pages for source-driven expansion.
What Changed

Created a dedicated Quartz vault for Thorpe research.
Configured project metadata for thorpe-family-research.
Imported the initial source package from C:\Users\zach\Desktop\Thorpe.
Added foundational wiki pages and indexing structure.
Added project agent guidance files (CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, AGENTS.md).

Files Created or Updated
Core project files

package.json (homepage/repository updated)
quartz.config.ts
.github/workflows/deploy.yml (removed Copley timeline copy step)
.gitignore

Content pages

index.md
Home.md
People Directory.md
Search Index.md
CHANGELOG.md
Topics/Thorpe Pedigree Timelines.md
References/Butch Thorpe Email.md
People/Robert Butch Thorpe.md

Agent guidance and handoff

CLAUDE.md
GEMINI.md
AGENTS.md
AGENT_HANDOFF_PHASE_1A.md

Raw source imports

References/raw/butch-thorpe-email.txt
References/raw/PedigreeTimelines2025.cdr
References/raw/PedigreeTimelines2019Descendants2.cdr

Verified Facts from Sources
From References/raw/butch-thorpe-email.txt:

Butch provided pedigree timeline attachments.
Timeline bars represent ancestor lifespans.
Red dots indicate official records with numbered references to Butch’s copies.
Blue dots indicate census records.
Not all ancestors are shown; only early generations that fit page space.
Butch can provide a PDF catalog of record types.

Known Limitations

The .cdr files are not directly transcribed in this environment.
Person-level extraction from those files is pending export to PDF/image.
Current person-level data is intentionally minimal to avoid unsourced claims.

Build/Test Status

npm ci completed
npm test passed
npm run build passed
npm run check reports broad formatting warnings inherited from copied Quartz source files

Git/GitHub Status

Repository created: github.com/zcopley/thorpe-family-research
Branch: main
Initial commit pushed: 74744eb

Recommended Next Steps

Export PedigreeTimelines2025.cdr and PedigreeTimelines2019Descendants2.cdr to PDF/image.
Request Butch’s record-type PDF and numbered-reference legend.
Begin structured extraction into People/ profiles with explicit source citations.
Add generation taxonomy once enough relationships are transcribed.

Home.title: Home
Home.content:
Thorpe Family Research Vault
Welcome to the Thorpe family research vault. This project is separate from the Copley family vault and is focused on building a source-grounded Thorpe genealogy.
Scope

Build Thorpe family person profiles from primary or near-primary records
Track source provenance and confidence levels
Preserve direct source files and extraction notes
Cross-link to Copley research only where family lines intersect

Initial Sources

Butch Thorpe Email
Thorpe Pedigree Timelines

Next Steps

Open and export PedigreeTimelines2025.cdr to PDF or image format.
Open and export PedigreeTimelines2019Descendants2.cdr to PDF or image format.
Request Butch’s PDF catalog of record types and the key for numbered record references.
Start structured extraction of people, dates, places, and relationships into People/ pages.

People/Robert-Butch-Thorpe.title: Robert Butch Thorpe
People/Robert-Butch-Thorpe.content:
Robert “Butch” Thorpe
Biographical Profile

Name: Robert “Butch” Thorpe
Role in this project: Source contributor for initial Thorpe pedigree timeline materials.

Contribution to the Vault

Provided timeline interpretation instructions in Butch Thorpe Email.
Provided two CorelDRAW pedigree files documented in Thorpe Pedigree Timelines.

Research Gaps

Confirm full legal name formatting and middle name/initial.
Confirm relationship path to Zach’s wife.
Obtain and catalog the record-type PDF and numbered-reference key mentioned in the email.

Sources

Butch Thorpe Email
References/raw/butch-thorpe-email.txt

References/Butch-Thorpe-Email.title: Butch Thorpe Email
References/Butch-Thorpe-Email.content:
Butch Thorpe Email
Source file: References/raw/butch-thorpe-email.txt
Sender and Context

Sender signs as Butch (nickname for Robert “Butch” Thorpe).
Message sent to Zach with interpretation guidance for attached pedigree timeline files.

Extracted Statements

Attachments are intended as a resource-finding aid and include pedigrees.
Horizontal bars represent ancestor lifespans.
Not all ancestors with records are shown; only those from earliest generations that fit on the page.
Red dots denote official record types, with nearby numbers referencing Butch’s personal copies.
Blue dots denote census records at timeline dates.
Butch can provide a PDF describing the record types he has collected.

Notes
This email provides interpretation metadata for the .cdr pedigree files and should be cited when describing how timeline markers are encoded.

Topics/Thorpe-Pedigree-Timelines.title: Thorpe Pedigree Timelines
Topics/Thorpe-Pedigree-Timelines.content:
Thorpe Pedigree Timelines
This page tracks the pedigree timeline files provided by Robert “Butch” Thorpe and documents what they contain.
Files Provided

References/raw/PedigreeTimelines2025.cdr
References/raw/PedigreeTimelines2019Descendants2.cdr

Butch’s Notes on How to Read the Timelines
Per Butch’s email:

Horizontal bars represent ancestor lifespans.
Red dots indicate official records.
Numbers by red dots refer to Butch’s personal record copies.
Blue dots indicate census records corresponding to the date marked by vertical lines.
The charts show selected early generations that fit on each page, not all ancestors with records.

Current Limitation
The files are CorelDRAW (.cdr) documents and require export to PDF or image before structured transcription into person pages can proceed.
Requested Follow-up Sources

PDF list of record types collected by Butch
Mapping/key for numbered red-dot record references

index.title: Thorpe Family History
index.content:
The Thorpe Family
This vault is the starting point for a dedicated Thorpe family research project.
Maintained by Zach Copley with source contributions from Robert “Butch” Thorpe.
Where to Start

Home
People Directory
Search Index
Thorpe Pedigree Timelines
Butch Thorpe Email
CHANGELOG

Current Research Status
The initial source package contains:

An explanatory email from Butch
Two CorelDRAW pedigree timeline files (.cdr)

The .cdr files require CorelDRAW-compatible viewing/export before detailed names, dates, and relationships can be transcribed into person pages.
